description_long: This is a modern, two-story concrete house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The structure features large rectangular openings for windows and doors, with prominent blue vertical and horizontal supports, especially on the right side where a green pergola extends over a patio area. The house has a cantilevered upper floor, creating a sheltered space below, and a combination of open and enclosed areas. The exterior is primarily gray concrete, accented by blue and green metal elements, giving it a contemporary urban appearance. The windows are large and asymmetrically arranged, maximizing natural light and views. The overall form is geometric and blocky, with clean lines and a functional layout.
description: A modern, two-story concrete house with flat roofs, blue supports, and a green pergola over a patio. The design is minimalist with large windows and a cantilevered upper floor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, blue supports, and the green pergola on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the cantilevered upper floor, and the pergola structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back openings, blue supports, and the extended patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with fewer visible openings and a more enclosed appearance.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a flat overhang, blue columns, and a sheltered porch area.
